---
title: "NFL Success Dashboard"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false
required_pkgs <- c("dplyr", "ggplot2", "scales", "shiny")
missing_pkgs <- required_pkgs[!vapply(required_pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]

if (length(missing_pkgs) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste0(
      "Missing required package(s): ",
      paste(missing_pkgs, collapse = ", "),
      ". Install with: install.packages(c(",
      paste(sprintf('"%s"', missing_pkgs), collapse = ", "),
      "))"
    )
  )
}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(shiny)

source("R/nfl_data_prep.R")

team_season <- load_nfl_standings() |>
  prep_nfl_team_season(min_season = 2002) |>
  add_team_style()
```

## {.sidebar width="300px"}

```{r}
selectInput(
  inputId = "season_input",
  label = "Season",
  choices = sort(unique(team_season$season), decreasing = TRUE),
  selected = max(team_season$season)
)

selectInput(
  inputId = "conf_input",
  label = "Conference",
  choices = c("All", sort(unique(team_season$conf))),
  selected = "All"
)

checkboxInput(
  inputId = "playoff_only",
  label = "Show playoff teams only",
  value = FALSE
)
```

## Row

### Style Map

```{r}
plotOutput("style_map_plot", height = "420px")
```

### Winning Signal

```{r}
plotOutput("wins_signal_plot", height = "420px")
```

## Row

### Team Table

```{r}
tableOutput("team_table")
```

```{r}
#| context: server
selected_data <- reactive({
  df <- team_season |>
    filter(season == input$season_input)

  if (input$conf_input != "All") {
    df <- df |>
      filter(conf == input$conf_input)
  }

  if (isTRUE(input$playoff_only)) {
    df <- df |>
      filter(playoff_flag)
  }

  df
})

output$style_map_plot <- renderPlot({
  selected_data() |>
    ggplot(aes(x = points_for_pg, y = points_allowed_pg, color = style, label = team)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_text(check_overlap = TRUE, nudge_y = 0.25, size = 3) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Offense vs. defense profile:", input$season_input),
      x = "Points scored per game",
      y = "Points allowed per game",
      color = "Team style"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
})

output$wins_signal_plot <- renderPlot({
  selected_data() |>
    ggplot(aes(x = point_diff_pg, y = win_pct, color = playoff_flag)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "gray30") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#1b9e77", "FALSE" = "#d95f02"), labels = c("No", "Yes")) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    labs(
      title = "Point differential as a winning signal",
      x = "Point differential per game",
      y = "Winning percentage",
      color = "Made playoffs"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
})

output$team_table <- renderTable({
  selected_data() |>
    transmute(
      Team = team,
      Conference = conf,
      Wins = wins,
      Losses = losses,
      `Win %` = percent(win_pct, accuracy = 0.1),
      `Pts/Game` = round(points_for_pg, 1),
      `Opp Pts/Game` = round(points_allowed_pg, 1),
      `Diff/Game` = round(point_diff_pg, 1),
      Playoffs = if_else(playoff_flag, "Yes", "No"),
      Style = style
    ) |>
    arrange(desc(Wins), desc(`Diff/Game`))
}, striped = TRUE, bordered = TRUE, spacing = "xs")
```
